import { useState } from "react"; import "./sidebar.css"; import { LineStyle, Timeline, TrendingUp, PermIdentity, Storefront, AttachMoney, BarChart, MailOutline, DynamicFeed, ChatBubbleOutline, WorkOutline, Report, FreeBreakfastRounded, } from "@material-ui/icons"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; export default function Sidebar() { const [homeIsActive, setHomeIsActive] = useState(false); const [analyticsIsActive, setAnalyticsIsActive] = useState(false); const [salesIsActive, setSalesIsActive] = useState(false); const [usersIsActive, setUsersIsActive] = useState(false); const [productsIsActive, setProductsIsActive] = useState(false); const [transactionsIsActive, setTransactionsIsActive] = useState(false); const [reportsIsActive, setReportsIsActive] = useState(false); const [mailIsActive, setMailIsActive] = useState(false); const [feedbackIsActive, setFeedbackIsActive] = useState(false); const [messagesIsActive, setMessagesIsActive] = useState(false); const [manageIsActive, setManageIsActive] = useState(false); const handleClick = (name) => { switch(name) { case 'home': setHomeIsActive(true); setAnalyticsIsActive(false); setSalesIsActive(false); setUsersIsActive(false); setProductsIsActive(false); setTransactionsIsActive(false); setReportsIsActive(false); setMailIsActive(false); setFeedbackIsActive(false); setMessagesIsActive(false); setManageIsActive(false); break; } } return (
